Barbed Ringmail Leggings  
 


Slot: LEGS
AC: 25
STR: +3 STA: +7
WT: 5.3 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Barbed Ringmail Leggings

Slot: LEGS
AC: 25
STR: +3 STA: +7
WT: 5.3 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Velious Chain 2
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:50 pp 0 gp 5 sp 0 cp
Tribute:1044
Submitted By:Nymphan
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-09 03:40:07
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 45
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Velketor's Labyrinth
NPC Name
Bled


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Velketor's Labyrinth


Uploaded November 6th, 2024 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
More rare than the BP
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2002 at 6:17 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592252462989
View User Forum
Sage
211 posts
Aloha all

The barbed ringmail legs drops off Mr. Bled, and generally required a good level 60 group to get into the castle area to pull and kill.

The barbed ring tunic drops off several of the mobs in velks, but it is most commonly dropped off of Upper Dogs named mob Tpos Icepaw.

Since Upper deck was considered by some to be the best non-AoE exp pre-Luclin and Pre-PoP, there are a lot of the BPs floating around ( I think I have like 5 or so ...) However, since it required a much better group to go deeper, the legs were less often camped. and once gotton, are kept by the chain class people until they complete their Velious quest armours.

Hope that explains why the legs cost more (on drinal about 7k -- BPs are selling for 2500 ish)
▲ Page top
Did I get a steal?
QuoteReply
# Dec 19 2002 at 5:20 PM Rating: Decent

QuoteReply
# Sep 30 2001 at 9:31 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763878907
258 posts
What would be a good price on these things? Also, on a rogue, Ry'gorr or these (AC13 STA2 DEX2 MR3 CR5 HP5). I'm a barbie, if you were curious. That's Barbarian to all you newbies >:-p
▲ Page top
RE: P-R-I-C-E
QuoteReply
# Sep 01 2002 at 5:09 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759552183
33 posts
2 things stand out in my mind... One, you are asking for a PC then explaining that barbie means Barbarian. Anyone that doesn't know that would indeed qualify as a newb but therefore would be unlikely to give you an accurate PC so you're kinda spinning your wheels there. Two, the fact that you felt compelled to try and issue an explanation at all screams that you are either A: a newb yourself and trying to impress by repeating something you just learned or B: so condecending that most newbs would ignore your comments no matter how valid or invalid they may be. So, though my comments were a little more drawn out and with a little less sarcasm than Dakanmer for instance =) I have to agree with the spirit of his reply. In other words, you've now been flamed not once but twice. If it's any consolation to you though it's my first time, which I guess makes me a newb flamer... =) All in good fun peeps, all in good fun...

▲ Page top
Nice item
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2001 at 10:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768435223
20 posts
Well for anyone on Terris-Thule server good luck getting a group in Velks under 50, unless your a 48 or 49 enchanter. This zone is almost always packed with at least 40 or more people. We took this guy out a couple days ago, unfortunately he dropped the Barbed Ringmail Vambraces 20ac 3dex 3wis. These legs have about the same ac as DW Greaves and I hardly think they could be considered a twink item. When we took Bledrek we had over 2 full groups of 55+, and he was quite a handful, the best strategy imo is the main tank strategy, worked very well for us. Good Luck
▲ Page top
bled
QuoteReply
# Sep 17 2001 at 11:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250996501
1 post
bled dropped these for me, bledrek hits for 400ish+ i suggest 2 groups 55+ minimum.

you will never find these for sale. myself... ill be handing these down to a guildmate when i get blood lords or blood runed legs.

rogue of the 51st dagger
officer of Mistaken Identity, Drinal

These blow away the gay ol darkscale greaves, black ice greaves, etc... one of, if not the best leg pieces droppable for the classes listed, even warrior. I personally wouldn't wear them as a shaman but thats just because I have spirit weaver's greaves. If I still had jarcrap leggings or plane of hate greaves i'd take these in a heartbeat.

Dude, from one bard to another, this blows lambent away. SS greaves are darn near impossible to come by, these on the other hand, are easier to get, and almost as good. Personally, I'm thinking of hitting Velk's up some time now.

▲ Page top
Not easy at 45
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2001 at 9:45 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I suppose it is humanly possible for a full group or probably 2 full groups of L45 people with really good gear and skills might have a snowballs chance in hell of getting this item.
But don't get your hopes up. Velks isn't really a L45 dungeon anymore, the mobs have been upped in level. that's why the drops are so good.
You'd probably do a lot better there with a group around 50-55.
▲ Page top
RE: Not easy at 45
QuoteReply
# Sep 08 2001 at 7:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758653941
14 posts
actually i'd say more like 55-60. anyone below 55 will really hold the group back. these mobs are really badass and will resist almost everything if you're not a higher level than the mob itself. and a tank lower than the mob will get trashed, cleric wont be able to heal ya fast enough.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 10 2001 at 9:40 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I suppose it is humanly possible for a full group or probably 2 full groups of L45 people with really good gear and skills might have a snowballs chance in hell of getting this item.
level
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2001 at 9:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756104078
14 posts
level obtained is a little off, barbed ringmail drop off the crystal gargoyle people behind the kobalds... lvl has always been 55 doable with one group but it can turn bad real fast if your not careful.

I'll never see them
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2001 at 8:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965763218
5 posts
Not sure why Timog says "twink item". I'm a 48 ranger and I have Ry`Gorr leggings. I would GLADLY trade them for these. I would imagine these selling for quite a bit.

Someone in GD last night was auctioning a 30 AC Barbed Ringmail piece. Sounds like he found the tunic. He was sure to include "(rare)" in his auction. I suppose there are people out there that deal in antiquities and rarities! :-)

#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 10 2001 at 4:33 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) That's the first thing that comes across your mind? Nice "twink" item?

This is pretty nice item, around the same stats as silver-plated leggings if you ask me. Might want to try and check those out sometime too.

▲ Page top
RE: Nice
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2001 at 9:10 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757469021
Scholar
24 posts
I'm told Velks has recently been tweaked to make it feasible for high 40s groups to hunt there. That said, I would expect these things (AC 25! on legs!) to drop somewhat deeper in than a 45-50 group might want to go.

But it might be random drop off anything, you never know!
▲ Page top
RE: Nice
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2001 at 9:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763446526
48 posts
Velketors Lab was recently upgraded. I seriously doubt any level 45 group could get to where these drop and survive. Level 50 group. Doubtful, but possible. Mid-50s, yes.

It used to be that the spiders at the entrance turned green to mid-50 players. Since the recent update to the zone, nothing in the zone is green even to a level 60 player.

It also seems that since the mobs are tougher (higher level), the drops have better stats as well. I got the Barbed Ringmail BP the other night, and it had 30 AC. The sites I checked showed it having 25 AC. So that must have been from the lower level version of the zone.
▲ Page top
RE: Nice
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2001 at 8:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763446526
48 posts
Velks was recently updated... meaning upgraded. About the lowest level players I have seen there lately have been low 50s. Even the entrance mobs are blue to a level 60 player now.

As far as getting back to where you get these, I woul suspect a solid group of mid-50 players could do it.

Its a nice item, as are the other Barbed Ringmail drops. I got the BP the other night, and the AC 30 on it is nice. Seems it was upgraded from the previous AC 25 when the zone was updated.
▲ Page top
RE: Nice
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2001 at 9:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249606794
